title: bulbophyllum scaberulum
intro: Bulbophyllum scaberulum, also known as the hairy orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum scaberulum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a popular remedy for various ailments. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as an infusion or decoction, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
